name: Baltimore City Property Tax Records Guide
reason: Human-readable archival PDF; requires manual review/OCR and citation tracking before normalization.
source: Maryland State Archives / Baltimore City Archives
temporal_coverage: 1797-1915 tax records guide and series description
description: Guide to Baltimore City property tax records including general tax books, assessor tax records, and field assessor work books.
future_work: Extract series/year/roll references into data/archival/sources and normalize owner/address/value events with confidence-scored joins.

name: Baltimore City Property Tax Records Online Guide
reason: Research guide page; use as source index, not as a directly ingestible data layer.
temporal_coverage: 1797-1915 digitized tax records; assessor records 1800-1867; field assessor work books 1837-1896
description: Research guide describing digitized Baltimore property tax records and access requirements.

name: Baltimore City Archives Geography Sources
reason: Research guide for map/atlas sources; Sanborn and atlas sheets require georeferencing before use.
temporal_coverage: Historic maps and atlases, including Sanborn updates through the 1950s in archive holdings
description: Guide to Sanborn maps, Bromley and Thompson atlases, and Baltimore City block maps.

name: Library of Congress Sanborn Fire Insurance Maps Guide
reason: Guide/search entry point; individual map sheets must be selected and georeferenced.
temporal_coverage: Historic Sanborn editions including Baltimore sheets where available
description: Library of Congress guide for searching Sanborn fire insurance map holdings.

name: Baltimore Permit History Request
reason: Request workflow for archived permits/property files; not bulk machine-readable.
temporal_coverage: Older permits, citations, building plans, inspection notes, certificates, occupancy reports
description: Official workflow for requesting older permit and property records from Baltimore City.

name: Baltimore City Records Management
reason: Records management reference; used to locate archival record transfer and inventory workflows.
source: Baltimore City Department of Legislative Reference
description: Records Management Center information for temporary and permanent historical records.

name: Maryland Inventory of Historic Properties - Baltimore City Search
reason: Search interface and scanned survey files; needs record-by-record extraction.
description: Baltimore City entries in the Maryland Inventory of Historic Properties.

name: Maryland Inventory of Historic Properties Map Service
reason: Machine-readable map service exists, but parcel-level use needs schema review and Baltimore City coverage validation.
description: Statewide MIHP map service candidate for future historic-property overlays.
